BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Association of Community Action Partnerships of Louisiana

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: ROMA Training Workshop, Organizational Standards, Board Training, Fiscal Workshop, Customer Service

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.RecipientPersonNm: St James Parish Dept of HR

ProgramServiceRevPartVIIGrp.Desc: LHC Technical Assistance and Related Professional Services

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: Each activity contributes to helping low-income individuals and families achieve economic self-sufficiency and stability.

The Louisiana Housing Corporation (LHC) and the Association of Community Action Partnerships of Louisiana (ACAP) have entered into a contract to achieve the following objectives: (1) For ACAP to facilitate quarterly meetings with CAP agencies; (2) conduct monthly meetings with LHC; (3) Submit monthly progress and performance reports; (4) Work with LHC to develop communication information to CAP agencies; (5) Work with program and executive management staff to develop and implement new procedures related to administration of the Low Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LiHEAP) and Weatherization Assistance Program (WAP); (6) Any other related tasks as deemed necessary between the parties during the term of the contract.
Member organizations pay dues to contribute to program expenses incurred throughout the year.
Each activity contributes to helping low-income individuals and families achieve economic self-sufficiency and stability.
Contributes to helping low-income individuals and families achieve economic self-sufficiency and stability.

OtherIncomeDetail.Desc: LHC Technical Assistance and Related Professional Services
